response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified performer as Oozora Subaru from the video title. 2. Detected two distinct songs: 'ふれ・あて・す！' and 'Watch me!'. 3. Searched for both songs. 'Watch me!' lyrics were found. 'ふれ・あて・す！' appears to be an original song without widely available official lyrics online; therefore, I am setting its lyrics to null.
response.global_summary: A video capturing two live musical performances from Oozora Subaru's 7th anniversary live event: her original song 'ふれ・あて・す！' and a cover of the song 'Watch me!' by YOASOBI.

scenes.description: Oozora Subaru performs her original song 'ふれ・あて・す！'. The stage features a beach-themed background with pixel art elements.
Oozora Subaru performs a cover of 'Watch me!' originally by YOASOBI. The stage lighting features blue and pink hues with pixelated hearts.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I always end up causing trouble for you, 
i always end up making things so difficult, 
but still, you stay by my side, 
always right here with you. 
♪ 
with vague words, 
i can’t get through to serious you, 
i want to peek inside your strong heart, 
i want to melt it. 
i want to melt it. 
how about this kind of magic for times like this? 
what will come out? 
let ’s do it! 
ready, set! 
try try try 
even if it ’s uncertain, 
it ’s okay! it ’s okay! 
which one to pick, 
watch me do magic, 
oh, this is turning out better than i imagined, 
i can’t stop now. 
sorry, 
my overflowing feelings are spinning out of control, 
sprinkling happy images around, 
and casting fancy magic everywhere, 
again, you’ll probably nag me, but look, 
this kind of day by day is perfect, 
since that day, 
falling in love with you, 
it hasn’t changed, 
always only you. 
so, look, 
this isn’t the time to hesitate, 
grab that happy ending, 
forever, 
i want to keep laughing by your side. 
♪ 
always left out, 
alone every day, 
then you appeared before me, 
sharing the same loneliness, 
such a kind person, 
so, so gentle. 
i still have a lot of worries, 
but now, neither of us is alone anymore, 
these noisy, precious days, 
may they last forever. 
three, two, one! 
spread happy images, 
the most amazing fancy magic, 
again, you’ll probably nag me, 
but this kind of day by day is perfect, 
since that day, 
falling in love with you, 
i want you to notice, 
loving you, 
that ’s why, 
this isn’t the time to hesitate, 
what ’s the next plan? 
and today, another surprise, 
what kind of strange thing will happen tomorrow? 
stay by my side and watch, 
always.
